textByHash.6cc3c438863da84524d54635cdd783796b271c26: Where me? Skin burn...arrgh...eyes hurt...let me go!
textByHash.51fb21403168c9edf59bad858dd12d81319b6f67: Whyeee cage? Argh...please help me! Graaahhh!
textByHash.82aeae45d5fb678e9d8029615e511b7826da8b86: You create hurt. Not fair, let me free!
textByHash.d51d5de243f1b5a06f389c55cda89d4c90f09819: Arggh, so alchemist create me now I trapped for experiements. But still I confused.
textByHash.0371e92b981f239bd48d067cd5278fd994ffeca2: Me see logic, feeeel magic. A mix of the two.
textByHash.c79e534777974f3f6569bf3b5f9cdd7e312ca41d: No so sure it is easy to do. No one canna 'elp. Arghhh.
textByHash.0bb99f981747a3c6cc0081b064b2be64478a5847: That it! Make sense now, thank you!
textByHash.a4d21af8f6ae39b906b6e32300d71d4dbc6056ed: No does matter which you chose. Me needed organise my thoughts. I see there is truth in both.
textByHash.8329820911ed57693ed294eb19adb9cc78f74256: Now we go scare alchemies - they have been wrong to do this! Although I have life, they mustn't go about this again.
textByHash.aaa386fe274edb5e000f44be63420f910a6d655c: Easy. You run down and I watching from here. I surprise right moment.
textByHash.d8fde1e8169e927cb604606a1372601bc5a70dab: Better. You been mine angel. I now have the understanding I need.
textByHash.3c6f13a073f6e81d72365c504bd3fbb2a6ff9a07: Please, alchemists you speak, me appear to surprise.
textByHash.9e88cd757cca71e940c658374296c4558fbdfbca: Me not hurt. Now tell. What you plans? What you do with me?
textByHash.751e1fcbc2dac665d0e0a91156235a5558b825a2: Bad play with. Naughty men. Go! Go, never return!
textByHash.c9161ca6064b7eb693d68f516d545f9856eb14c9: Me look dungeon. Please meet there.
textByHash.53306096cdb2bc437569e0332832835a2f23cbed: Me do know. Pleased you rescue.
textByHash.4dd5e8735a821c19af97b38495750dcf93066561: They use essence of Guthix power. Create tower pump this from ground. Make me with godly power. Dangerous.
textByHash.3a8560151b01dfd1f0776dab3ce30b3bbc1ad79a: Thrank you. For reward you speak me, I makes monsters.
textByHash.9881232ec59a39bb02127fefdd187e4c171c3b7e: Good! I gain know from alchemists and builders. Me make beings.
textByHash.016520d46795801e90fd5cda182e839999a47e79: Inspect symbol of life altars around dungeon. You see item give. Use item on altar. Activate altar to create, you fight.
textByHash.1c85975dae7b9a97cc1418a2b1c7c6034a038cda: You no haveee the two materials need.
textByHash.0ed3353509b783afb7939457be13eb48fd498668: You haveee materials need. Here goes!
